page_meta.title: Enter Voting Code
page_meta.description: Enter the voting code sent to your email to proceed with voting

errors.ip_mismatch_message: Your IP address has changed. This is for security purposes.

instructions.english_intro: We have sent you an email
instructions.english_ago: minutes ago, mentioning your voting code. You can use this code for the next
instructions.english_remaining: minutes to open the voting form. If you don't see email in your mailbox, then please check your Spam mail also.
instructions.nepali_ago: मिनेट अघाडी एउटा इमेल पठाएका छाैं। भोटिङ पर्म खोल्नको लागि त्यो कोड लाइ अर्काे
instructions.nepali_remaining: मिनेट सम्म प्रयाेग गरिसक्नु पर्ने छ। यो फर्मलाइ एकछिन यत्तिकै राखेर अब यहाँले आफ्नो इमेलमा चेक गर्नुहोस।
instructions.nepali_spam_warning: तपाइले आफ्नो मेल वक्समा एनआरएनएको इमेल भेट्टाउनु भएन भने स्पाम मेलमा गएर वसेको हुन सक्छ, त्यसैले स्पाम मेल पनि चेक गर्नुहोस।

public_demo.code_hint: Enter this code below to continue.
public_demo.instructions_body: Your personal voting code is shown above. Enter it in the field below and click "Next" to begin.
public_demo.guide_link: How does the demo election work?

how_it_works.title: How does the demo election work?
how_it_works.description: Get complete step-by-step guidance and understand the entire voting process before you begin.

form.submit_button: 🗳️ PRESS HERE TO GET VOTING FORM
form.submit_button_nepali: भोटिङ फर्म प्राप्त गर्न यहाँ थिच्नुहोस्
